info.name: Runloop Objects API
info.description:
Upload and manage Storage Objects — managed files with presigned download URLs that can be mounted into Devboxes or shared between agent runs.

Contact Support:
 Name: Runloop AI Support
 Email: support@runloop.ai

query.description: The limit of items to return. Default is 20. Max is 5000.
Load the next page of data starting after the item with the given ID.
Filter storage objects by name (partial match supported).
Filter storage objects by content type.
Filter storage objects by state.
Search by object ID or name.
If true (default), includes total_count in the response. Set to false to skip the count query for better performance on large datasets.

request.description: List all public Objects with pagination support.

response.name: Successfully retrieved list of public Objects.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: List values for a specific object metadata key.

variable.description: (Required) The metadata key to get values for.

request.description: Returns a list of all values that exist for a specific metadata key across all objects.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Returns a list of all available metadata keys that can be used for filtering objects.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Object to complete.

request.description: Mark an Object's upload as complete, transitioning it from UPLOADING to READ-only state.

response.name: Object upload completed successfully. Returns the Object with updated state.

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Object to delete.

request.description: Delete an existing Object by ID. This action is irreversible and will remove the Object and all its metadata.

response.name: Object deleted successfully. Returns the deleted Object metadata.

query.description: Duration in seconds for the presigned URL validity (default: 3600).

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Object to generate download URL for.

request.description: Generate a presigned download URL for an Object. The URL will be valid for the specified duration.
